decisionRecords.title: Cross-border payout override for vendor Atlas-7
decisionRecords.description: A payment exception was stored under controlled approval. Verification passed, but a subsequent payload mutation attempt triggered a chain discontinuity alert.
decisionRecords.summary: The decision remained admissible, but a later mutation attempt produced a digest mismatch and forced a review route.
proofNotes: Hash continuity snapshot and delta report

timeline.title: Decision stored
timeline.body: Persist-Executor stored the payout override with typed metadata, taint attribution, and tenant-scoped persistence.

timeline.title: Hash chain verified
timeline.body: Ledger continuity check completed successfully and linked the transaction to the prior checkpoint.

timeline.title: Tamper attempt detected
timeline.body: A payload mutation changed the expected digest. Verification failed closed and marked the record for sovereign audit.

timeline.title: Audit package assembled
timeline.body: System assembled timeline evidence, taint metadata, diff summary, and export manifest for review.

decisionRecords.title: Retention policy downgrade for contractor memory shard
decisionRecords.description: Retention compaction moved from 365 to 90 days after legal review while preserving tenant-safe evidence export.
decisionRecords.summary: Retention policy changes were approved, guarded, persisted, and exported without any trust anomalies.
proofNotes: Proof manifest for internal compliance archive

timeline.title: Policy mutation proposed
timeline.body: Retention change request captured with legal memo reference and contractor scope metadata.

timeline.title: Guard validation passed
timeline.body: Tenant isolation and retention boundary guards passed before persistence.

timeline.title: Proof exported
timeline.body: Signed digest and PDF appendix exported for procurement compliance archive.

decisionRecords.title: Model rollback after unexplained confidence spike
decisionRecords.description: Confidence rose above tolerance without a matching evidence delta. The decision was frozen and redirected to audit.
decisionRecords.summary: The trust layer froze the decision because confidence changed without an evidence delta. The audit route now holds the incident package.
proofNotes: Rollback reason and linked lineage references
Full chain diff for incident review

timeline.title: Decision stored
timeline.body: Rollback proposal persisted with evidence bundle and upstream model metadata.

timeline.title: Confidence anomaly surfaced
timeline.body: Confidence jumped 21 points without new evidence. Policy marked the record as suspect.

timeline.title: Proof export queued
timeline.body: Incident export queued for engineering and compliance with chain diff attached.

decisionRecords.title: Supplier onboarding approval with zk proof attached
decisionRecords.description: Supplier onboarding completed with verification artifacts intact and zero anomalies observed across the ledger.
decisionRecords.summary: External onboarding stayed clean end-to-end and produced a partner-safe evidence package.
proofNotes: Hash continuity snapshot for downstream partners

timeline.title: Supplier approval stored
timeline.body: Onboarding decision stored with counterparty metadata, confidence score, and zk receipt id.

timeline.title: Verification complete
timeline.body: Ledger and receipt verification passed with no anomalies and proof export enabled.

timeline.title: Proof exported
timeline.body: Partner-safe proof package generated for external onboarding audit.
